# CounselO — Online Legal Consultation Platform

CounselO (counselo-legal.com) is an online legal consultation platform serving Saudi Arabia and Syria. Founded and led by Lawyer and Legal Counsel Omar Al-Baghdadi with 30+ years of experience and 20,000+ cases handled.

## Services
- Family Law (divorce, custody, inheritance)
- Business & Commercial Law
- Employment Law
- Real Estate Law
- Foreign Investment Law
- Administrative Law
- Criminal Law
- Banking & Finance Law
- Tax Law
- Cyber Law
- Medical Malpractice
- Insurance Law
- Immigration Law
- Arbitration
- Enforcement Law
- Companies Law
- Contracts Law

## How it works
Clients submit their legal question via WhatsApp or email and receive a professional written response within 24 hours. No office visit required. Available in Arabic and English.

## Contact
- WhatsApp / Phone: +966 59 485 0247
- Email: info@counselo-legal.com
- Website: https://counselo-legal.com

## Regions
- Saudi Arabia: https://counselo-legal.com/sa
- Syria: https://counselo-legal.com/syr

## Languages
Arabic and English (bilingual site with region-specific legal content).
